'''Niran''' was a [[Planet/Legends|world]]<ref name="Imperial Garrisons" /> located within the [[Niran system/Legends|Niran system]], a part of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Tunka sector/Legends|Tunka sector]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Viran Qol]].<ref name="Imperial Garrisons" />

At some point by [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],<ref name="Date">{{JournalCite|12|Imperial Garrisons}} features an [[in-universe]] mention of the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], which is dated to [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]] by ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> Qol was enrolled in a civil [[Engineer/Legends|engineering]] program on Niran. The [[Standard day/Legends|day]] after his graduation, Niran was [[Invasion of Niran|invaded]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Qol became involved with the [[Niran Resistance]] less than a [[Standard week/Legends|week]] later and eventually became a [[Major/Legends|major]] with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Special Forces]].<ref name="Imperial Garrisons" />

==Behind the scenes==
Niran was first mentioned in "[[Imperial Garrisons]]," a [[1997]] [[roleplaying game]] source article written by [[Timothy S. O'Brien]] and published in the [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 12|twelfth issue]] of the ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]'' magazine.<ref name="Imperial Garrisons" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Niran [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the world Niran, within grid square I-18.<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>
